objects.text: Eager UX Design student seeking an internship to collaborate and learn alongside experienced professionals. I’m excited to apply my skills in user research, wireframing, and prototyping to create inclusive and user-friendly designs.

• Conducts user research and creates personas to inform design decisions.
• Develops wireframes and interactive prototypes.
• Collaborates with clients to gather feedback and iterate on designs.

Bachelor of Fine Arts in Interaction Design

• GPA: 3.4
• Relevant Coursework: User-Centered Design, Interaction Design, Information Architecture, Visual Design, and Usability Testing
• Club Memberships: Computer Society, Design Lab
